# hono-on-cf

> Monorepo: Hono API on Cloudflare Workers.

## Packages

- [data-ops](packages/data-ops/AGENTS.md): Shared DB layer (Drizzle ORM, Zod v4, Better Auth) consumed by the API
- [data-service](apps/data-service/AGENTS.md): REST API on Cloudflare Workers using Hono with WorkerEntrypoint pattern

## Rules

### General
- [General TypeScript & Cloudflare](.claude/rules/general.md): Type safety, error handling, naming, array access, bug fix workflow
- [Cloudflare Deployment](.claude/rules/cloudflare-deployment.md): Hostname separation, custom domains, SSL/TLS
- [Error Handling](.claude/rules/error-handling.md): Layered error approach across data-ops and data-service

### data-ops
- [Drizzle ORM](.claude/rules/data-ops/drizzle.md): Schema definitions, migrations, query patterns
- [Zod Validation](.claude/rules/data-ops/zod.md): Schema naming conventions, request/response patterns
- [Better Auth](.claude/rules/data-ops/better-auth.md): Auth config, auto-generated schema
- [Neon Postgres](.claude/rules/data-ops/neon.md): Serverless DB connection patterns

### data-service
- [Hono](.claude/rules/data-service/hono.md): Handler/service/query pattern, middleware chain, Result type
- [Cloudflare Workers](.claude/rules/data-service/cloudflare-workers.md): Worker patterns and bindings
- [Durable Objects](.claude/rules/data-service/durable-objects.md): DO patterns
- [Queues & Workflows](.claude/rules/data-service/queues-workflows.md): Queue consumers, workflow definitions
- [Storage](.claude/rules/data-service/storage.md): KV, R2, D1 patterns
- [Agent SDK](.claude/rules/data-service/agent-sdk.md): Cloudflare Agents SDK patterns
- [Agent Workflows](.claude/rules/data-service/agent-workflows.md): Agent workflow orchestration

## Agents

- [Design Doc Writer](.claude/agents/dd-w.md): Create design documents and technical specifications
- [Design Doc Implementer](.claude/agents/dd-i.md): Implement features from existing design documents
- [MVP Advisor](.claude/agents/mvp-e.md): Ensure speed-over-perfection principles

## Skills (via brainstormer plugin)

- [Ask](plugins/brainstormer/skills/ask/SKILL.md): Discovery interviews, pressure-test ideas
- [Blueprint](plugins/brainstormer/skills/blueprint/SKILL.md): PRD creation as GitHub issue
- [Carve](plugins/brainstormer/skills/carve/SKILL.md): Break PRD into phased vertical slices
- [Dispatch](plugins/brainstormer/skills/dispatch/SKILL.md): Convert PRD to dependency-ordered GitHub issues
- [Lean](plugins/brainstormer/skills/lean/SKILL.md): MVP advisor, speed over perfection
- [TDD](plugins/brainstormer/skills/tdd/SKILL.md): Red-green-refactor with vertical slices
- [Brainstorm](plugins/brainstormer/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md): Orchestrated end-to-end planning workflow

## Commands

- [Implement](.claude/commands/implement.md): Implement a design doc
- [Verify Design Docs](.claude/commands/verify-dd.md): Review design docs for implementation readiness
